overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a rocky mountain trail through pine forest. Two riders on horseback pass by briefly at the midpoint before the character continues ascending to a scenic summit overlooking a vast wilderness valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail through pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail winding through rocky terrain with pine forest on the left

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation lining the right side of the trail
dense cluster of tall pine trees on the left slope
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass and stones
large rocky outcrops visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a peaceful walk along a mountain trail surrounded by natural wilderness. Large rock formations dominate the right side while dense pine forest covers the left slope, with the path winding ahead through the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with horseback riders passing

events.description: two riders on horseback gallop past the camera from center to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as two mounted riders approach and pass by closely

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback galloping down the trail toward and past the camera

segments.scene_description: Two riders on horseback suddenly appear in the distance and rapidly approach, galloping past the camera along the narrow trail. The riders kick up dust as they pass within close proximity before continuing down the mountain path.

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the steeper section of trail toward the ridge line

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers lining the trail edges
loose stones and small boulders scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The ascent continues up the mountain slope with the trail becoming rockier and more exposed. The dense pine forest falls away behind as the path climbs through areas of tall grass and scattered boulders toward the summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit overlook with panoramic views

events.description: trail reaches summit crest and opens to expansive valley vista

agents.ego_description: reaching the summit and pausing to pan across the panoramic wilderness view

entered.detail: expansive view of rolling forested hills stretching to the horizon
layered mountain ranges visible in the far distance under hazy sky
rocky precipice dropping off to the valley below

segments.scene_description: The trail culminates at a rocky summit where the view suddenly opens to reveal a breathtaking panoramic vista. The camera pans across the vast wilderness showcasing rolling forested hills, distant mountain ranges, and valleys extending to the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a mountain trail that transforms from a secluded forest path into a sweeping panoramic summit. It begins with a peaceful walk through a wilderness of large rock formations and dense pine forests that line the winding trail. As the camera moves forward, two riders on horseback suddenly gallop past in close proximity, kicking up dust before disappearing down the path. The ascent then continues as the forest falls away, shifting the terrain toward more exposed rocky slopes and patches of tall grass. Finally, the trail culminates at a rocky peak where the view opens wide to reveal a breathtaking vista of rolling forested hills and distant mountain ranges under a partly cloudy sky.
